name: AbnormalSense
displayDescription: Real-time security monitoring system detecting strangers and abnormal behaviors in video streams. Needed for automated surveillance in restricted areas without manual monitoring. Works by combining face recognition (ArcFace/RetinaFace), pose estimation (HRNet/YOLO-Pose), object tracking (ByteTrack), and skeleton-based behavior analysis (ST-GCN) in a dual pipeline. Contains 4 parts: face recognition service, pose estimation service, behavior analysis engine, and FastAPI serving layer. Used by security teams. Built with PyTorch Lightning, FastAPI, Docker microservices.
